dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4354 IS: Saving Transit Art Resources Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Hirono (for herself and Mr. Reed) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

form.official-title: To amend title 49, United States Code, to allow certain funds to be used for incremental costs of incorporating art into facilities, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Saving Transit Art Resources Act or the STAR Act.

subsection.text: Section 5323(h) of title 49, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1), by inserting or after the semicolon;

subsection.text: Section 5309 of title 49, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subsections (q) and (r) as subsections (p) and (q), respectively.
